Harbor Dunes Capital PJSC (Controller) and Desert Ledger Services FZ-LLC (Processor) — DPA Schedule and Data Export Approval under UAE PDPL and free zone equivalents (DIFC DP Law 2020; ADGM DP Regulations 2021).
Purpose: onboarding of clients for corporate finance mandates on a UAE MTF; processing excludes MNPI beyond internal restricted-list flags.
Categories: Emirates ID image (verification only), trade licence details of signatory, name, business email, mobile, and deal-room access logs; data minimisation applied to exclude family-origin fields.
Control statement: No biometric templates are captured and no Emirates ID numbers are stored after verification is completed.
Cross-border transfer: limited support data may be accessed by Sandsphere Analytics Pvt. Ltd. (processor sub-contractor in Al Manal Tech Park, outside the UAE) for ticket triage, under PDPL-compliant transfer safeguards and standard clauses recognised in DIFC/ADGM.
Data-export approval HDC-TXP-26-04 signed by Ms. Mariam Al Najjar (DPO) on 2026-05-21; copies retained in the transfer register; contact: privacy.office@harbordunes.example.
DSAR log: Mr. Rashid Al Kareem requested access and copy on 2026-04-30; fulfilled on 2026-05-10 with redactions of internal risk notes; identity re-verified via onboarding credential check.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Salma Quraishi opted out of marketing on 2026-05-03; erasure of marketing profile completed on 2026-05-04 and suppression flag set; service emails remain unaffected.
Retention: Emirates ID images are kept for 90 days post-onboarding then replaced with an irreversible hash; trade licence copies are kept for 6 years for audit; we no longer retain any ID images older than policy inception.
MNPI handling: issuer-specific non-public information remains ring-fenced within compliance; no MNPI was transferred outside the UAE in the last reporting period.
Onboarding form update: the optional family-origin field was removed; where previously captured, entries were deleted on 2026-03-15 and downstream caches purged.
Minimisation marker: deal-room access logs are truncated to resource identifiers and timestamps only, excluding IP addresses unless a security incident is suspected.
International transfers not in scope: no personal data is sent to non-adequate jurisdictions other than the approved processor location; prior US transfer channels were decommissioned.
Data subject channels: submit DSARs or erasure requests to dsar@harbordunes.example or via https://privacy.hdc.example; complaints may reference the competent local authority but are first handled by our DPO.
